title: Los Angeles
description: A Los Angeles sequence moving between downtown towers, sculptural facades, terraced podiums, and a Pacific sunset.

cover.alt: Orange sunset over the Pacific with dark rocks, breaking surf, and stacked stone cairns.

items.alt: Angular rooftop observation structure catching late sun above palms.
Pink concrete facade with a glowing lantern-like window at dusk.
Blurred pastel sunset over a calm shoreline and dark trees.
Glass residential tower lit by golden-hour sun at a downtown intersection.
Black-and-white view of the Walt Disney Concert Hall facade across an empty street.
Black-and-white view of sharp concrete volumes and bright rooflines.
Terraced beige podium with trees, glass canopies, and a blue leasing banner.
Twilight city intersection with illuminated residential towers and traffic lights.
Midday view of a tiered facade with trees, glass canopies, and leasing signage.
Black-and-white concrete building geometry with bright sunlit edges against a blank sky.
